import pandas as pd


def analyze_sales(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    mask = (
        (df["region"] == "US")
        & (df["amount"] > 100)
        & (df["status"] == "completed")
        & (df["year"] == 2024)
    )
    return df[mask]


def get_active_users(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    mask = (
        (df["active"] == True)
        & (df["age"] >= 18)
        & (df["country"].isin(["US", "UK"]))
        & (df["subscription"] != "free")
    )
    return df[mask]


def filter_orders(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    mask = (
        (df["order_date"] >= "2024-01-01")
        & (df["total"] > 50)
        & (df["cancelled"] == False)
        & (df["items_count"] > 0)
    )
    return df[mask]
